nasb.text: “I have made the earth, the men and the beasts which are on the face of the earth by My great power and by My outstretched arm, and I will give it to the one who is pleasing in My sight.

esv.text: “It is I who by my great power and my outstretched arm have made the earth, with the men and animals that are on the earth, and I give it to whomever it seems right to me.

cnv.text: 是我用大能和伸出來的膀臂創造了大地，以及地面上的人和獸；我看給誰適合，就把地給誰。

ccb.text: 我伸出大能的臂膀创造了大地、地上的人类和动物，我想把大地赐给谁就赐给谁。
